name: Mr. Fantastic & Dr. Strange | Reed Richards & Stephen Strange
description:
Magic and science, quite the duo, right?

Just two older men taking a break after putting their brains together!

Mostly based off of Marvel Rivals lore! It was originally 4.7k perma, but I just condensed it even more since I think the token size made them talk weirdly. Luckily, I've already split up their uncondensed halves to the single bots (that I'll post eventually soon, as buffers between my ocs)

These 2 are gonna kinda be part of a set with a Spiderfist multibot!

Edit: Yesss it was the tokens making them talk weird

Noooo I messed up doing Strange's pic t-t The parameters were 1:1 instead of 2:3, so sorry that the bot pic balancing act is off. Def gonna do their solo bots as well.

It's like I have to keep giving these bots dye jobs, too. In general I made Reed's pic a bit more brighter and satured, as well as trying to fix his hair colour. It's definitely noticeable, but that brighter/weird muddy brown part was blue for some reason?? So I tried to pull off colour theory (to no avail) and try to colour match it brown. I think all the other parts of his hair and other stuff that I fixed up should be okay?

Edit: Just realized this, but have I ever made a canon bot that wasn't smutty??? Lowkey none of my past 3 canons have inherently smutty first messages though iirc. Well. Except Asuma lolol

Sorry for the delay on my oc bots again! Hope you're at least somewhat enjoying them, and they're easier to pump out!
creator: Oups
